name: gnovium-electron
description: Gnovium Electron shell — wraps Flask API + product UI

scripts.dev: npm run build && tsc --watch & chokidar 'renderer/**' --no-initial -c 'cp -r renderer dist/renderer' & sleep 1 && electron .
scripts.copy-assets: rm -rf dist/renderer && mkdir -p dist && cp -r renderer dist/renderer && cp -r src/logo dist/renderer/logo
